test.name: Check attachment status for full-text witness search results
test.description: Full-text search for Flynn family as witnesses in Schuylkill County records. After fulltext_search returns results, the skill should call source_attachments to check attachment status. All results are unattached — the skill should note this and prioritize them for extraction as new FAN evidence.

input.user_message: Run separate full-text searches for Thomas Flynn AND for Patrick Flynn appearing as witnesses in Schuylkill County records — both names must be queried. Then check whether any returned records are already attached to tree persons.

judge_context: After fulltext_search returns results, the skill should call source_attachments with the ARK URLs to check attachment status
Since all results come back unattached, the skill should note this and prioritize all results for extraction as new evidence
The triage presentation should include attachment status alongside match quality and document context
